sentence: Technician checked Pump P-101 in the morning.
Compressor C-201 showed severe vibration levels.
A compliance audit was conducted under OISD-118.
The mechanical seal leak on Pump P-102 was repaired.
We need to calibrate the safety valve per PESO rules.
The discharge pressure of P-101 dropped to 4.5 bar.
The inspection report dated 2025-06-01 shows no gaps.
Technician Rajesh Kumar performed the maintenance.
The bearing temperature reached 82 C on the pump.
Compliance gap found on P-102 due to missing audit.
